subject: A large patchwork creature assembled from mismatched parts — a carved wooden or ceramic mask for a face, fabric and straw stuffing for a body, fabric horns, and a smaller doll riding on its back
description: A hulking creature faces the viewer in a misty grey forest. Its face is a grinning wooden or ceramic mask with glowing amber eyes and exaggerated teeth. Its body appears to be constructed from shredded fabric in blue-grey and pink tones, stuffed with straw or fiber. Two fabric horns rise from its head. A smaller rag-doll-like figure is visible on its back, also appearing to be assembled from scraps. The forest behind it is bare-branched and foggy, with small dim lights floating in the distance. The creature's expression is manic but the scene is deeply uncanny rather than outright aggressive.
foreground: Large patchwork creature with mask-face, glowing eyes, shredded fabric body
background: Bare misty grey forest with floating dim lights
emotion: manic, uncanny — the mask-grin is fixed and unsettling, the glowing eyes convey an eerie vitality
